title: Join our closed alpha testing for a new caller feature in the monday sales CRM!

posts.author: Inbaltal (Inbal Tal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community!

We’re looking for some volunteers to help us in a closed alpha for a new caller feature in the CRM. We have a few spots left for companies that are interested in calling leads or contacts.

We need current CRM users and for you to commit to using the feature for 4 weeks and conduct weekly meetings with us to get feedback.
If you’re interested in learning more, please fill out the following form and we will get back to you ASAP with details!

forms.monday.com

Alpha testers for monday sales CRM caller | WorkForms

From requests, feedback to data collection and more. Turn your insights into action with customizable WorkForms.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: What a great opportunity to experiment and test out an exciting new feature, while being able to share feedback directly to the product team! Community - you don’t want to miss out on this!
